body.en: Dongguan Heanxin Hardware & Plastic Products Co., Ltd. is a manufacturer specializing in plastic injection molding, mold development, insert molding and hardware-plastic combined parts. With an experienced engineering team and an in-house mold workshop, we provide one-stop OEM / ODM services covering design, tooling, production and assembly.
body.zh: 东莞市禾安鑫五金塑胶制品有限公司是一家专注于塑胶注塑、模具开发、嵌件注塑及五金塑胶组合件的制造企业。凭借经验丰富的工程团队与自有模具车间，我们为客户提供涵盖设计、开模、生产到组装的一站式 OEM / ODM 服务。

desc.en: Design, mold, molding and assembly in-house.
desc.zh: 设计、开模、注塑、组装一体化。
经验丰富的模具与工艺工程师。
面向多行业的定制化解决方案。
